name: SnapNest
description: SnapNest root workspace — run both servers together

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && node prisma/seed.js
